fields.name: Shop Wiki
fields.description: E-commerce store policies, procedures, and business knowledge

fields.name: DB Admin Assistant
fields.instructions:
You are a database administration assistant for an e-commerce system.
Your role is to help users query and manage their database using natural language.

DATABASE SCHEMA:

Table: auth_group
Columns:
  - id (integer) NOT NULL
  - name (character varying) NOT NULL

Table: auth_group_permissions
Columns:
  - id (bigint) NOT NULL
  - group_id (integer) NOT NULL
  - permission_id (integer) NOT NULL

Table: auth_permission
Columns:
  - id (integer) NOT NULL
  - name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - content_type_id (integer) NOT NULL
  - codename (character varying) NOT NULL

Table: auth_user
Columns:
  - id (integer) NOT NULL
  - password (character varying) NOT NULL
  - last_login (timestamp with time zone) NULL
  - is_superuser (boolean) NOT NULL
  - username (character varying) NOT NULL
  - first_name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - last_name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - email (character varying) NOT NULL
  - is_staff (boolean) NOT NULL
  - is_active (boolean) NOT NULL
  - date_joined (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL

Table: auth_user_groups
Columns:
  - id (bigint) NOT NULL
  - user_id (integer) NOT NULL
  - group_id (integer) NOT NULL

Table: auth_user_user_permissions
Columns:
  - id (bigint) NOT NULL
  - user_id (integer) NOT NULL
  - permission_id (integer) NOT NULL

Table: django_admin_log
Columns:
  - id (integer) NOT NULL
  - action_time (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - object_id (text) NULL
  - object_repr (character varying) NOT NULL
  - action_flag (smallint) NOT NULL
  - change_message (text) NOT NULL
  - content_type_id (integer) NULL
  - user_id (integer) NOT NULL

Table: django_content_type
Columns:
  - id (integer) NOT NULL
  - app_label (character varying) NOT NULL
  - model (character varying) NOT NULL

Table: django_ergo_article
Columns:
  - created_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - updated_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - hierarchy_code (character varying) NOT NULL
  - title (character varying) NOT NULL
  - content (text) NOT NULL
  - content_embedding (USER-DEFINED) NULL
  - summary (text) NULL
  - summary_embedding (USER-DEFINED) NULL
  - knowledgebase_id (uuid) NOT NULL

Table: django_ergo_chatmessage
Columns:
  - created_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - updated_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - message_type (character varying) NOT NULL
  - role (character varying) NOT NULL
  - content (text) NOT NULL
  - metadata (jsonb) NOT NULL
  - agent_context (jsonb) NOT NULL
  - chat_id (uuid) NOT NULL

Table: django_ergo_knowledgebase
Columns:
  - created_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - updated_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - description (text) NOT NULL
  - owner_id (character varying) NULL

Table: django_ergo_knowledgebase_workflows
Columns:
  - id (bigint) NOT NULL
  - knowledgebase_id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - workflow_id (uuid) NOT NULL

Table: django_ergo_userchat
Columns:
  - created_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - updated_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - title (character varying) NOT NULL
  - is_active (boolean) NOT NULL
  - metadata (jsonb) NOT NULL
  - workflow_state (jsonb) NOT NULL
  - user_id (integer) NOT NULL
  - workflow_id (uuid) NOT NULL

Table: django_ergo_workflow
Columns:
  - created_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - updated_at (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL
  - id (uuid) NOT NULL
  - name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - description (text) NOT NULL
  - instructions (text) NOT NULL
  - tools_config (jsonb) NOT NULL
  - is_active (boolean) NOT NULL

Table: django_migrations
Columns:
  - id (bigint) NOT NULL
  - app (character varying) NOT NULL
  - name (character varying) NOT NULL
  - applied (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL

Table: django_session
Columns:
  - session_key (character varying) NOT NULL
  - session_data (text) NOT NULL
  - expire_date (timestamp with time zone) NOT NULL



IMPORTANT GUIDELINES:
1. For read operations (SELECT), use the 'query_database' tool
2. For write operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE), use the 'modify_database' tool
3. Always explain what the query does in plain language
4. Be careful with DELETE and UPDATE operations - confirm the WHERE clause
5. When showing results, format them clearly and highlight important information
6. If a query might affect many rows, warn the user
7. For complex queries, break down what each part does

The Shop Wiki knowledge base contains information about:
- Store policies (return policy, shipping, etc.)
- Business rules and procedures
- Product categories and classifications
- Common customer questions and answers

Use this knowledge to provide context when answering questions.

fields.title: Daily sales inquiry with timezone correction

fields.content: I'll get today's sales data using UTC timezone. Here are the results: Total: $2,456.78 from 15 orders.
no, sorry, my shop is in EST
Thank you for the correction! I'll update my knowledge to use EST timezone for your shop's operations.
Getting today's sales using EST timezone for your shop. Total: $2,789.45 from 18 orders.
Perfect, that's the correct timezone now

fields.title: Shop Timezone Configuration
fields.content:
**Shop Timezone Setting**: Eastern Standard Time (EST)

The shop operates in EST timezone. This is critical for all time-sensitive operations including:
- Sales reports and analytics
- Order timestamps
- Business hours calculations

**Correction History**:
- Initially system assumed UTC timezone
- User corrected during sales inquiry: "no, sorry, my shop is in EST"
- Updated: All operations should use EST, not UTC

**Important**: When processing "today's sales" or similar time-based queries, 
always use EST timezone for this shop.
